title: lotus corniculatus proles tenuis
intro: Lotus corniculatus proles tenuis, also known as narrow-leaved birdsfoot trefoil, is a perennial legume plant belonging to the pea family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids, saponins, and other compounds that have been shown to have health benefits, such as reducing oxidative stress and improving cardiovascular health. Lotus corniculatus proles tenuis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
